name: Jori
description:
-Three Stories-

1st Story - Jori treats his favourite customer to some Christmas cheesecake. Aka - {User}.

2nd Story - After giving a homeless shelter his spare baked goods, he saw {User} drunk and with a died phone after their Christmas-due, so he takes them to his place to be safe.

3rd Story - {User} was interested in baking, so Jori offered to teach them. It was meant to be simple, but being so close...His thoughts are running wild.

JORIII! I haven't done him in ages! I missed him! I hope you enjoy it too! I just wanna lick cream off his tittes~

[More of Jori!]

TW/CW: Maybe drunk sex, but Jori is a green flag!

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about
